query:
-- Recalculate Ham cost from valid matches only
UPDATE inventoryItems SET 
  lastCost = (SELECT unitPrice FROM invoiceLineItemMatches WHERE matchedItemName = 'Ham' AND matchStatus = 'auto_matched' ORDER BY invoiceId DESC LIMIT 1),
  avgCost = (SELECT AVG(unitPrice) FROM invoiceLineItemMatches WHERE matchedItemName = 'Ham' AND matchStatus = 'auto_matched'),
  costPerUsableUnit = (SELECT unitPrice FROM invoiceLineItemMatches WHERE matchedItemName = 'Ham' AND matchStatus = 'auto_matched' ORDER BY invoiceId DESC LIMIT 1) / (yieldPct / 100),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE name = 'Ham';

-- Recalculate Mozzarella cost from valid matches
UPDATE inventoryItems SET 
  lastCost = (SELECT unitPrice FROM invoiceLineItemMatches WHERE matchedItemName = 'Mozzarella' AND matchStatus = 'auto_matched' ORDER BY invoiceId DESC LIMIT 1),
  avgCost = (SELECT AVG(unitPrice) FROM invoiceLineItemMatches WHERE matchedItemName = 'Mozzarella' AND matchStatus = 'auto_matched'),
  costPerUsableUnit = (SELECT unitPrice FROM invoiceLineItemMatches WHERE matchedItemName = 'Mozzarella' AND matchStatus = 'auto_matched' ORDER BY invoiceId DESC LIMIT 1) / (yieldPct / 100),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE name = 'Mozzarella';

-- Recalculate Peppers cost (now with purchaseAmount=5, need to re-divide)
-- The unitPrice in matches was already divided by old purchaseAmount (1), so we need to use raw invoice prices
-- Actually the match unitPrice = invoiceUnitPrice / purchaseAmount, and old purchaseAmount was 1
-- So match unitPrice IS the invoice case price. Now purchaseAmount=5, so real per-kg = match_unitPrice / 5
-- But we can't easily fix this without re-running. Let's just update the avg from what we know
UPDATE inventoryItems SET 
  lastCost = (SELECT unitPrice / 5 FROM invoiceLineItemMatches WHERE matchedItemName = 'Peppers' AND matchStatus = 'auto_matched' ORDER BY invoiceId DESC LIMIT 1),
  avgCost = (SELECT AVG(unitPrice / 5) FROM invoiceLineItemMatches WHERE matchedItemName = 'Peppers' AND matchStatus = 'auto_matched'),
  costPerUsableUnit = (SELECT unitPrice / 5 FROM invoiceLineItemMatches WHERE matchedItemName = 'Peppers' AND matchStatus = 'auto_matched' ORDER BY invoiceId DESC LIMIT 1) / (yieldPct / 100),
  updatedAt = NOW()
WHERE name = 'Peppers';

SELECT name, lastCost, avgCost, costPerUsableUnit, purchaseAmount FROM inventoryItems WHERE name IN ('Ham', 'Mozzarella', 'Peppers', 'Olive oil');
